description: Build the 3 Trackers (College, Tuition, Self Study), Revision System with spaced repetition, and the complete Exams section with past/upcoming exams, syllabus checklists, countdown, and exam mode.
steps: Create src/pages/Trackers.tsx - Tab container for 3 trackers: College Tracker, Tuition Tracker, Self Study Tracker. Each tab shows its respective tracker component.

Create src/components/trackers/CollegeTracker.tsx - Syllabus progress tracker. Hierarchy: Subject -> Paper -> Chapter -> Topic. User adds chapters/topics per subject+paper. Mark topics as 'completed', 'in progress', 'not started'. Progress bar per chapter, per paper, per subject showing percentage. Overall progress card at top.

Create src/components/trackers/TuitionTracker.tsx - Finance + Accounting tuition tracking only. Log tutor lessons: date, subject, paper, topic covered, homework from tutor, notes. List view of past lessons. Link tuition homework to main task system.

Create src/components/trackers/SelfStudyTracker.tsx - Log self-study sessions: date, subject, paper, topic, duration (minutes), notes, what was accomplished. Weekly summary chart showing hours per subject. Streak counter for consecutive study days.

Create src/stores/useTrackerStore.ts - Manages all 3 tracker types. CollegeProgress: { subjectId, paperId, chapters: [{ name, topics: [{ name, status }] }] }. TuitionEntry: { date, subjectId, paperId, topic, homework, notes }. SelfStudyEntry: { date, subjectId, paperId, topic, duration, notes }.

Create src/pages/Revision.tsx - Spaced repetition dashboard. Shows: (1) Today's revision queue - topics due for review today, (2) Upcoming revisions this week, (3) Completed revisions history. Each revision card shows topic, subject, last reviewed date, review number (1st, 2nd, 3rd...).

Implement spaced repetition logic in src/stores/useRevisionStore.ts - When user marks topic 'studied' anywhere (tracker, daily log), it enters revision queue. Schedule: Day 1, Day 3, Day 7, Day 14, Day 30 after initial study. Track review count. Allow manual reschedule by dragging to different date.

Create src/components/revision/RevisionCard.tsx - Shows topic name, subject, paper, days since last review, review number in sequence, 'Mark Reviewed' button (advances to next interval), 'Skip' button, 'Remove from queue' button.
Create src/pages/Exams.tsx - Tab container: Past Exams, Upcoming Exams, Exam Syllabus. Plus exam countdown widget visible on all tabs.

Create src/components/exams/PastExams.tsx - Log past exams: date, subject, paper, total marks, obtained marks, percentage auto-calculated, notes/reflection. Table view with sorting. Performance chart per subject over time.

Create src/components/exams/UpcomingExams.tsx - Add upcoming exam: name, start date, end date, subjects included. Upload exam routine as image (stored as base64 in localStorage). Countdown timer to next exam. List of all upcoming exams sorted by date.

Create src/components/exams/ExamSyllabus.tsx - Per exam: select subjects -> per subject+paper -> chapter checklist. Check off chapters as prepared. Progress percentage per subject for the exam. Links to college tracker data.

Implement Exam Mode in useExamStore.ts and useTaskStore.ts - When an exam is <7 days away, auto-activate exam mode: (1) Filter tasks to show exam subjects first, (2) Boost revision frequency for exam subjects, (3) Show 'EXAM MODE' banner on dashboard, (4) Countdown prominent on all pages.
Create src/components/exams/ExamCountdown.tsx - Displays days/hours/minutes to next upcoming exam. Shows exam name and subjects. Animated countdown. Used on dashboard and exams page.
If no pending tasks exist for current view, show 'Revision Queue' section with today's revision items as suggestion on dashboard and tasks page
acceptance_criteria: College tracker shows hierarchical progress: subject > paper > chapter > topic with percentage bars
Tuition tracker logs lessons for Finance and Accounting with all fields
Self study tracker logs sessions with duration and shows weekly summary
Revision system auto-queues topics after marking as studied
Marking a revision as reviewed advances it to next interval
Past exams can be logged with marks and show performance data
Upcoming exams show countdown and accept image upload for routine
Exam syllabus provides chapter checklists per subject+paper per exam
Exam mode activates when exam <7 days: banner shown, exam subjects prioritized
Revision queue shown when no pending tasks
npm run build succeeds without errors
findings: All acceptance criteria met. Build passes cleanly. Added accomplishment and homework fields to TrackerEntry type. Used existing addExam/addExamSubject pattern for PastExams. ExamCountdown auto-activates exam mode via useEffect when exam <7 days away. The revision store getCompletedToday uses interval subtraction to detect today's reviews.
